content_id: Allah Yang Maha Tinggi berfirman: 'Dan perangilah mereka itu, sehingga tidak ada fitnah lagi dan (sehingga) ketaatan itu hanya semata-mata untuk Allah.' [Surat al-Anfal (8): 39]. Karena Allah tidak ridha dengan kufr dan syirik maka wajib bagi mukmin untuk juga tidak ridha dengan keduanya. Ini karena cinta dan benci mukmin harus selaras dengan apa yang Allah cintai dan benci; sehingga ia marah terhadap apa yang membuat Allah marah, dan ridha dengan apa yang Allah ridhai, Yang Maha Perkasa dan Agung. Sehingga karena Allah tidak ridha dengan kufr dan syirik, maka tidaklah layak bagi Muslim untuk ridha dengan keduanya. Kemudian syirik adalah sesuatu yang sangat serius dan berbahaya, sebagaimana Allah Yang Maha Perkasa dan Agung berfirman: 'Sesungguhnya Allah tidak akan mengampuni dosa syirik, dan Dia mengampuni segala dosa yang selain dari (syirik) itu, bagi siapa yang dikehendaki-Nya.' [Surat an-Nisa' (4): 48]. 'Sesungguhnya orang yang mempersekutukan (sesuatu dengan) Allah, maka pasti Allah mengharamkan kepadanya surga, dan tempatnya ialah neraka, tidaklah ada bagi orang-orang zalim itu seorang penolongpun.' [Surat al-Ma'idah (5): 72]. Nabi bersabda: 'Barangsiapa bertemu Allah tanpa menyembah apa pun bersama-Nya akan masuk Surga, dan barangsiapa bertemu Dia sambil menyembah selain-Nya bersama-Nya akan masuk Neraka.' [Diriwayatkan oleh Muslim (Eng. transl. 1/54/no. 168)]. KETIGA [27]: Bahwa barangsiapa taat kepada Rasul dan mengesakan Allah dengan seluruh ibadah, di atas tauhid, maka tidak diperbolehkan baginya untuk berteman dan beraliansi dengan orang-orang yang menentang Allah dan Rasul-Nya, meskipun mereka adalah orang-orang yang paling dekat hubungannya dengannya, dan dalilnya adalah firman Allah Yang Maha Tinggi: 'Kamu tidak akan mendapati sesuatu kaum yang beriman kepada Allah dan hari akhirat, saling berkasih sayang dengan orang-orang yang menentang Allah dan Rasul-Nya, sekalipun orang-orang itu bapak-bapak, atau anak-anak atau saudara-saudara ataupun keluarga mereka. Mereka itulah orang-orang yang Allah telah menanamkan keimanan dalam hati mereka dan menguatkan mereka dengan pertolongan yang datang daripada-Nya. Dan dimasukkan-Nya mereka ke dalam surga yang mengalir di bawahnya sungai-sungai, mereka kekal di dalamnya. Allah ridha terhadap mereka dan mereka pun merasa puas terhadap (limpahan rahmat)-Nya. Mereka itulah golongan Allah. Ketahuilah, bahwa sesungguhnya golongan Allah itulah golongan yang beruntung.' [Surat al-Mujadilah (58): 22]. Perkara ketiga yang wajib bagi kita untuk ketahui adalah tentang 'al-wala' wal-bara'' (yaitu loyalitas kepada para mukmin yang taat kepada Allah dan Rasul-Nya, dan permusuhan serta berlepas diri dari orang-orang kafir dan mereka yang menentang Allah dan Rasul-Nya). Sehingga loyalitas dan pelepasan diri ini adalah prinsip besar yang ditekankan dalam banyak teks. Allah Yang Maha Perkasa dan Agung berfirman: 'Hai orang-orang yang beriman, janganlah kamu ambil menjadi teman kepercayaanmu orang-orang yang di luar kalanganmu (karena) mereka tidak henti-hentinya (menimbulkan) kemudharatan bagimu.' [Surat Ali Imran (3): 118]. 'Hai orang-orang yang beriman, janganlah kamu mengambil jadi pemimpinmu, orang-orang yang membuat agamamu jadi buah ejekan dan permainan, (yaitu) di antara orang-orang yang telah diberi Kitab sebelummu, dan orang-orang yang kafir (orang-orang musyrik). Dan bertakwalah kepada Allah jika kamu betul-betul orang yang beriman.' [Surat al-Ma'idah (5): 57]. 'Hai orang-orang yang beriman, janganlah kamu jadikan bapak-bapak dan saudara-saudaramu pemimpin-pemimpinmu, jika mereka lebih mengutamakan kekafiran atas keimanan dan siapa di antara kamu yang menjadikan mereka pemimpin-pemimpinmu, maka mereka itulah orang-orang yang zalim.' [Surat at-Taubah (9): 23-24]. 'Sesungguhnya telah ada suri tauladan yang baik bagimu pada Ibrahim dan orang-orang yang bersama dengan dia; ketika mereka berkata kepada kaum mereka: Sesungguhnya kami berlepas diri dari kamu dari apa yang kamu sembah selain Allah, kami ingkari (kekafiran)mu dan telah nyata antara kami dan kamu permusuhan dan kebencian buat selama-lamanya sampai kamu beriman kepada Allah saja.' [Surat al-Mumtahanah (60): 4]. Ini karena berteman dan beraliansi dengan, serta berusaha menyenangkan orang yang menentang Allah adalah bukti bahwa keyakinan kepada Allah dan Rasul-Nya dalam hatinya memang lemah. Hal ini karena secara akal mustahil bahwa seseorang dapat mencintai sesuatu yang merupakan musuh dari orang yang benar-benar dicintainya. Aliansi dengan orang-orang kafir berarti membantu dan mendukung mereka dalam kekafiran dan kesesatan yang mereka ikuti; dan mencintai mereka ditunjukkan dengan melakukan hal-hal yang akan mendapatkan cinta dan persahabatan mereka dengan cara apa pun. Tanpa keraguan ini menunjukkan bahwa iman yang benar (eemaan) tidak ada sama sekali, atau setidaknya lemah.
content_en: Allaah, the Most High, says, "So fight them until their remains no worship of anything besides Allaah, and obedience and worship are purely for Allaah." [surah al-Anfaal (8):39] Since Allaah is not pleased with kufr and shirk it is obligatory that the Believer is also not pleased with them. This is because the Believers loving and hating must conform to what Allaah loves and hates; so that he is angry with that which angers Allaah, and is pleased with that which pleases Allaah, the Mighty and Majestic. So since Allaah is not pleased with kufr and shirk, then it is not fitting that the Muslim should be pleased with them. Then shirk is something very serious and dangerous, as Allaah, the Mighty and Majestic, says, "Indeed Allaah does not forgive associating anything in worship with Him, but He forgives whatever is lesser than shirk to whomever He pleases." [surah an-Nisaa' (4):48] "Indeed whoever associates anything in worship with Allaah, then Allaah has forbidden Paradise for him and his abode will be the Fire; and for the wrongdoers who worship others besides Allaah there is none to aid and save them on the Day of Resurrection." [surah al-Maa'idah (5):72] The Prophet (?H) said: "Whomever meets Allaah not worshipping anything along with Him will enter Paradise, and whoever meets Him having worshipped others along with Him will enter the Fire" [Reported by Muslim (Eng. transl. 1/54/ no.168)]. THE THIRD [27]: That whoever is obedient to the Messenger and singles out Allaah with all worship, upon tawhid, then it is not permissible for him to have friendship and alliance with those who oppose Allaah and His Messenger, even if they are those most closely related to him, and the proof is the Saying of Allaah, the Most High "You will not find a people who believe in Allaah and the Last Day loving those who oppose Allaah and His Messenger, even if they are their fathers, or their sons, or their brothers, or their kinsfolk. Rather Allaah has decreed true Faith for their hearts, and strengthened them with proof, light and guidance from Him; and He will enter them into the gardens of Paradise beneath whose trees rivers will flow, and they will dwell therein forever. Allaah is pleased with them and they with Him. They are the party of Allaah. Indeed the party of Allaah are the successful." [surah al-Mujaadilah (58):22] ________________________________________________________ The third matter which is obligatory for us to know is that of 'alliance and disassociation (al-Walaa wal-Baraa) (i.e. alliance with the Believers obedient to Allaah and His Messenger, and enmity and disassociation from the unbelievers and those opposing Allaah and His Messenger). So this alliance and disassociation is a great principle emphasised in many texts. Allaah, the Mighty and Majestic, says: "O you who believe do not take as friends and protectors those outside your religion, since they will not spare any effort in trying to corrupt you." [surah Aal- 'Imraan (3): 118] "O you who believe do not take as friends and protectors those who take your Religion as mockery and fun, from amongst those who received the Scripture before you, nor from the idolaters; and fear Allaah concerning this if you are truly Believers." [surah al-Maa'idah (5):57J “O you who believe do not take as friends and protectors your fathers and your brothers if they choose unbelief to belief, and whoever of you takes them as friends and protectors is one of the transgressors. Say, O Muhammad, to those who choose to remain in the land of the idolaters and not to emigrate to the land of Islaam: If your fathers; your sons; your brothers; your wives; your families; the wealth which you have earned; the trade which you fear you will lose; and homes which please you are dearer to you than Allaah and His Messenger and fighting jihaad in His cause, then wait until Allaah brings about His decree (the Conquest of Makkah) to see the retribution that awaits you, and Allaah does not guide the disobedient." [surah at-Tawbah (9):23-24] "There is a fine example for you to follow in Ibraaheem and those with him when they said to their unbelieving people: 'We are free of you and whatever idols you worship besides Allaah, and we deny and reject what you are upon; and because of your disbelief in Allaah and your worship of others besides Him, enmity and hatred has arisen between us for ever, unless you believe truly in Allaah, and single Him out, and worship Him alone." [surah al-Mumtahinah (60):4] This is because having friendship and alliance with, and seeking to please one who opposes Allaah is a proof that the belief in Allaah and His Messenger in his heart is indeed weak. This is because it is against reason that a person can have love for anything that is an enemy of the one he truly loves. Alliance with the unbelievers means to help and assist them in the unbelief and misguidance which they are upon; and having love for them is shown by doing those things which will earn their love and friendship by any means. Without a doubt this shows that true belief (eemaan) is either totally absent, or is at least deficient.
content_ar: Allaah, the Most High, says, "لذا fight them حتى their remains no worship of anything بالإضافة إلى Allaah, and obedience and worship are purely for Allaah." [السورة al-Anfaal (8):39] بما أن Allaah is not pleased with الكفر and الشرك يجب that the المؤمن is أيضاً not pleased with them. This is لأن the المؤمنون loving and hating must conform to what Allaah loves and hates; لذا that he is angry with that which angers Allaah, and is pleased with that which pleases Allaah, the Mighty and Majestic. لذا بما أن Allaah is not pleased with الكفر and الشرك, then it is not fitting that the مسلم should be pleased with them. Then الشرك is something very serious and dangerous, as Allaah, the Mighty and Majestic, says, "Indeed Allaah does not forgive associating anything in worship with Him, but He forgives whatever is lesser than الشرك to whomever He pleases." [السورة an-Nisaa' (4):48] "Indeed whoever associates anything in worship with Allaah, then Allaah hأماbidden الجنة for him and his abode will be the Fire; and for the wrongdoers who worship others بالإضافة إلى Allaah there is none to aid and save them on the Day of البعث." [السورة al-Maa'idah (5):72] النبي ﷺ (?H) said: "Whomever meets Allaah not worshipping anything along with Him will enter الجنة, and whoever meets Him having worshipped others along with Him will enter the Fire" [Reported by مسلم (Eng. transl. 1/54/ no.168)]. THE ثالثاً [27]: That whoever is obedient to الرسول ﷺ and singles out Allaah with all worship, upon tawhid, then لا يجوز for him to have friendship and alliance with those who oppose Allaah and His Messenger, even إذا they are those most closely related to him, and the proof is the Saying of Allaah, the Most High "You will not find a people who believe in Allaah and the Last Day loving those who oppose Allaah and His Messenger, even إذا they are their fathers, or their sons, or their brothers, or their kinsfolk. Rather Allaah has decreed true الإيمان for their القلوب, and strengthened them with proof, light and الهداية from Him; and He will enter them into the gardens of الجنة beneath whose trees rivers will flow, and they will dwell therein forever. Allaah is pleased with them and they with Him. They are the party of Allaah. Indeed the party of Allaah are the successful." [السورة al-Mujaadilah (58):22] ________________________________________________________ The ثالثاً matter which is obligatory for us لمعرفة is that of 'alliance and disassociation (al-Walaa wal-Baraa) (i.e. alliance with the المؤمنون obedient to Allaah and His Messenger, and enmity and disassociation from the unbelievers and those opposing Allaah and His Messenger). لذا this alliance and disassociation is a great principle emphasised in many texts. Allaah, the Mighty and Majestic, says: "O you who believe do not take as friends and protectors those outside your religion, بما أن they will not spare any effort in trying to corrupt you."
